# Psalms 45

## Verses (17)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | My heart is flowing over with good things; my words are of that which I have made for a king; my tongue is the pen of a ready writer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | You are fairer than the children of men; grace is flowing through your lips; for this cause the blessing of God is with you for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Put on your sword, make it ready at your side, O strong chief, with your glory and power. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | And go nobly on in your power, because you are good and true and without pride; and your right hand will be teaching you things of fear. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Your arrows are sharp in the heart of the king's haters; because of them the peoples are falling under you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Your seat of power, O God, is for ever and ever; the rod of your kingdom is a rod of honour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | You have been a lover of righteousness and a hater of evil: and so God, your God, has put the oil of joy on your head, lifting you high over all other kings. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Your robes are full of the smell of all sorts of perfumes and spices; music from the king's ivory houses has made you glad. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Kings' daughters are among your noble women: on your right is the queen in gold of Ophir. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | O daughter, give thought and attention, and let your ear be open; no longer keep in mind your people, and your father's house; | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | So will the king have a great desire for you, seeing how beautiful you are; because he is your lord, give him honour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | And the daughters of Tyre will be there with an offering; those who have wealth among the people will be looking for your approval. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | In the great house the king's daughter is all shining: her clothing is worked with gold. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | She will come before the king in robes of needlework; the virgins in her train will come before you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | With joy and rapture will they come; they will go into the king's house. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Your children will take the place of your fathers; so that you may make them rulers over all the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | I will keep the memory of your name living through all generations; and because of this the people will give you praise for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
